mapper.select: SELECT FROM `project_role_grant_log` WHERE `project_role_grant_id` = #{projectRoleGrantId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `grant_log_id` DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `project_role_grant_log` SET `project_role_grant_id` = #{projectRoleGrantId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `action_type` = #{actionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `operator_user_id` = #{operatorUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `before_snapshot_json` = #{beforeSnapshotJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `after_snapshot_json` = #{afterSnapshotJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `remark` = #{remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} WHERE `grant_log_id` = #{grantLogId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
